props.ChoiceText: Careful records gave you power over people who thought only in coin and goods.
props.ChoiceBio: Books and leverage taught you that records can bite harder than debts themselves.

0.TransitionText: Because books and leverage taught you that records can bite harder than debts themselves, you stayed in trade, trusting ledgers, favors, and nerve more than clean dealing.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Merchant, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because books and leverage taught you that records can bite harder than debts themselves, counting and comparison pulled you out of the market and deeper into learned study.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Scholar, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because books and leverage taught you that records can bite harder than debts themselves, profit turned into authority, and you began shaping trade.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Guildmaster, but you may remain on your current path instead.
